chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6245 of 2015 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025 ------------- On the last date of hearing i.e. 10.04.2025 none was present for the petitioner without intimation. Once again none present for the petitioner without intimation, though the name of the petitioner is appearing in the cause list. It appears that the petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
